How it works


Deposit

Open real account and add funds. We accept USDT and Bitcoin payment Method.

Invest

Invest $100 assets and earn 3% daily interest for 5 days. Use technical analysis and analysis the market.

Withdraw

Get funds easily to your e-wallat with your prefered coin type. We take no commission.

Safe and Secure

We take careful measures to ensure that your personal details are as safe as possible. offline storage provides an important security measure against theft $ loss

Features

We provide fastest trading using modern technologies. No delays in order executions and most accurate quotes. Our trading platform is available around the clock and on weekends. Cointrust-mining customer service is available 24/7. We are continuously adding new financial instruments. We also reward our customers with 10% commission for reffering users to our platform

  • Instant Deposit Approval
  • Instant 24/7 online support
  • Instant Withdrawal Approval
  • Sponsorship Commission Bonus


Register, Deposit and invest

Register, deposit and invest your crypto assest with Cointrust-mining to start earning 3% Interest daily




AFFILATE PROGRAM

Refer Your friends to earn 10% commission on their initial deposit

It only takes 40 seconds. No KYC required.

BTCUSD Chart by TradingView

Profit from Market Ups & Downs

Cointrust-mining allows you to actively invest your USDT and Bitcoin cryptocurrency to profit from market rallies and declines, or hedge your existing USDT and Bitcoin cryptocurrency holdings
